title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・不足物について

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(I can go further—faster! I'll surpass the limits
imposed upon me!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(To a new frontier of speed, where no
Umamusume has tread before!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a mad dash bordering on hysteria, Agnes
Tachyon renders the crowd speechless at the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They sit transfixed in a breathless silence.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Crossing the finish line is Agnes Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seconds later, the crowd erupts into a thunderous
roar celebrating the winner.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness, Agnes Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Watching that gave me goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Tachyon! Great job!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon flashes a smile towards the
nonstop cheering coming from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your support! Your voices gave me
strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd lets out another resounding cheer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon comes back with the crowd still
cheering and whistling behind her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Thanks for waiting for me again!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I must say, that was incredible. Almost something
akin to idolatry. I might even be venerated
postmortem.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However... it doesn't feel bad to bask in their
cheers. I might even describe it as pleasant, like
electricity coursing through my veins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, a look of worry spreads across her face.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I came so close to reaching the limits of the
Umamusume body today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But of course, I fell one step short.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My body was prepared. I had the requisite skill
and talent. I even thoroughly noted the effect of
the crowd's interference.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This is the first that I'm asking you something like
this, but it might also be the last—what is it that I
am lacking?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not talking about that. I'm talking about the
missing factor for my victory.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Look, I'll even entertain one of those wishy-washy
elements like love, aspiration, courage, or
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We put our heads together but fail to come up
with anything viable.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In any case, in two months, our goal for this
year—the Arima Kinen—will be upon us.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What better stage is there to prove myself?
Wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Arima Kinen on the horizon, I begin
seeking for an answer to what she's lacking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A lone figure stands behind Agnes Tachyon,
staring intently at her from behind.
